title: Echo Creek, KY
description: <CENTRE> <SIZE:medium> ECHO CREEK - NEW <LINE> <LINE><LEFT> <SIZE:small> Echo Creek is a humble town - the people here farm, pray, and like to keep to themselves - but it's rural Kentucky at its finest, and the perfect location for those wanting to explore the western reaches of Knox Country. <LINE> <LINE> Venture west to Ekron, take a trip south to Irvington and its famous speedway, or head north to Brandenburg. <LINE> <LINE> No matter which way you go, it'll be the trip of a lifetime!
